Based on the naming standard (`YYYYMMDD_<description>.json` or `.md` with date prefix), the files that need renaming are:

**\bbox{B,D,F,H}**

| File | Issue |
|------|-------|
| B. test_coverage_20260323.json | Date suffix instead of prefix |
| D. SprintMeetingNotes.json | Missing date prefix |
| F. user_activity_report.json | Missing date prefix |
| H. risk_assessment_v2.md | Missing date prefix |
